brand.name: Meah's Curry Sauces
brand.address: Unit H10, Park Avenue, Sundon Park Road, Luton, Bedfordshire, LU3 3BP

awards.title: Bedfordshire Food and Drink Award, Overall Winner

home.title: Welcome to Meah's Sauces
home.subtitle: Stock up on Meah's Curry Sauces for your left over turkey.
introParagraphs: Really fancy a curry but either can't afford to go out to a restaurant or you don't have the time and ingredients to cook one? With Meah's authentic curry sauces you can now have those restaurant flavours all in the comfort of your own home.

Our chefs combine a blend of traditional spices and locally grown fresh produce, all you need to do is cook your meat or vegetables and add sauce - giving you exactly what you desired without leaving the house or making a dent in your pocket.
home.availability: Available for sale now to the public or the wholesale.

heritage.title: Our heritage
paragraphs: Meah's Curry Sauces are the result of over 47 years of restaurant experience where we built up a reputation for producing delicately flavoured authentic Indian dishes and friendly service.

Following continuous requests from customers to make the restaurant's unique flavours available for home cooking, the company started offering its range of restaurant-style sauces directly for sale to allow you to make your own quality Indian dishes at home. Each of our hand-made classic sauces takes six hours to produce and contains locally grown fresh produce and traditional spices.
For the best results, use our easy-to-follow instructions on the top of the pot and re-create those same fresh unique tastes that our customers have been experiencing for the last 47 years.
heritage.notice: Please Note: Since the sale of Meah Tandoori restaurant in 2003, Meah's Flavours of India Ltd (Meah's Curry Sauces) has had no association with this business.

events.title: Events and Shows
events.description: Meah's says the team attends local farmers markets and food festivals across the UK, giving customers a chance to sample sauces and pick up recipe ideas in person.

news.description: Updates and announcements from Meah's Curry Sauces, including community activity and local partnerships.

products.name: Korma
products.shortDescription: Mild, creamy Northern India-style sauce suitable for chicken or vegetables.
products.description: Mild, smooth, and creamy Northern India-style sauce for chicken or vegetables.
products.ingredientsAllergens: Includes onions, water, rapeseed oil, coconut flour, potatoes, spices, milk powder, sugar, evaporated milk, garlic, ginger, carrots, malt vinegar, creamed coconut, mango slices, and acids. Allergens include sulphites, mustard, milk, and barley.
products.recipeIdea: Chicken Korma using 700g diced chicken, cooked with 2 tbsp oil, then simmered with the sauce.
products.nutritionPer100g: 568kJ / 137kcal, fat 9.3g, saturates 2.5g, carbohydrate 10.5g, sugars 10.0g, fibre 1.2g, protein 2.1g, salt 0.90g.
products.storage: Keep refrigerated; consume within 4 days of opening.

products.name: Dopiaza
products.shortDescription: Caramelised onion and pepper sauce in a "double onion" style.

Allergens include mustard, barley, and sulphites.

products.name: Balti
products.shortDescription: Punjabi and Birmingham-influenced tomato and onion sauce for prawns or meat.
products.description: Named after the cooking pot; Punjabi origin, associated with Birmingham in the late 1970s; tomato and onion-rich sauce for prawns or meat.
products.ingredientsAllergens: Includes onions, water, rapeseed oil, potatoes, green peppers, peeled tomatoes, spices, tomato puree, salt, garlic, ginger, carrots, lemon juice, green chillies, malt vinegar, tamarind, fenugreek, and acids. Allergens include mustard, sulphites, and barley.

products.shortDescription: Sweet, sour and warmly spiced sauce suited to chicken, prawns or vegetables.
